items.title: Stock Market Today: Indexes Mixed Ahead Of Nvidia Earnings; SEO Stock Soars On Adobe News (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dipped Wednesday ahead of the Fed minutes. Nvidia stock rallied ahead of earnings.

items.title: Trump declares Saudi Arabia 'major non-NATO ally' during MBS visit
items.description: Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman met with a handful of top CEOs at a White House dinner on Tuesday night as part of the US-Saudi Arabia investment forum. Yahoo Finance senior reporter Jennifer Schonberger breaks down the latest developments from this event, including President Trump's declaration of Saudi Arabia as "a major non-NATO ally." This all comes after the US inked a major defense contract with Saudi Arabia, selling F-35 fighter jets to the kingdom. Catch more of Jennifer Schonberger's coverage of the Saudi leader's visit to Washington, D.C., this week. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

items.title: Nvidia remains the most under-owned mega-cap tech stock
items.description: Investing.com -- Nvidia continues to be the most under-owned mega-cap technology stock in the United States, according to Morgan Stanley, which said the stock remains at the bottom of institutional portfolios despite its rapid growth and dominant position in artificial intelligence hardware.

items.title: CData Software Celebrates Fourth Consecutive Inclusion in Deloitte's 2025 Technology Fast 500™
items.description: CData Software today announced it ranked on the Deloitte Technology Fast 500™, a ranking of the 500 fastest-growing technology, media, telecommunications, life sciences, fintech, and energy tech companies in North America, now in its 31st year.

items.title: Perficient and Swantide to Disrupt Traditional Salesforce Service Delivery with AI-First Partnership
items.description: ST. LOUIS, November 19, 2025--Perficient announced a strategic partnership with Swantide, amplifying the firm's commitment to accelerate Salesforce value realization for clients.
